2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch adds documentation for the UFFDIO_RWPROTECT ioctl, which installs or removes read-write protection on a userfaultfd-registered memory range. The ioctl supports two mode bits: UFFDIO_RWPROTECT_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT_MODE_DONTWAKE. It also covers the behavior of read-write protection for populated pages only, anonymous vs file-backed reclaim, and error handling. The patch introduces a new man page (UFFDIO_RWPROTECT.2const) to document this ioctl.
